# TorqWings

> TorqWings builds AI-powered drone systems, custom UAVs, and aerial intelligence solutions for agriculture, infrastructure, mapping, and surveillance.

TorqWings combines aerospace engineering, custom UAV systems, aerial imaging, and AI analytics to convert drone missions into actionable intelligence across verticals such as AgriSky (agriculture), GuardSky (surveillance & fire response), GeoSky (mapping), InfraSky (infrastructure), TorqWings Labs (R&D), and TorqWings Academy (pilot training).

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of TorqWings's verticals, technology stack, and contact details.
